payload.text:
[CODE REVIEW REQUEST] round 1/3
关键代码点：
1) EventStream 消息类型支持
- `GradioStreamMessageType` 已覆盖：`progress | heartbeat | process_completed | close_stream`
- 位置：`front/services/hfService.ts` line 134

2) progress_data[0] 提取与进度计算
- 在 `parseProgressEvent` 中从 `progress_data[0]` 提取 `index/length/desc`
- 当 `length > 0` 时计算百分比并限制在 0-100
- 位置：`front/services/hfService.ts` line 155-176

3) 容错与去重
- `progress_data=[]` 时不会抛错，字段回退为 `null`
- 心跳包 (`heartbeat`) 可解析并透传
- 使用 `lastProgressSignature` 抑制重复进度事件
- 位置：`front/services/hfService.ts` line 270-296

4) 统一回调暴露（onProgress）
- `runGradioTask(..., onProgress?)` 新增统一回调参数
- 主生成链路 `generateImage` 及各模型分支已透传 `onProgress`
- 位置：`front/services/hfService.ts` line 222, 376, 429, 472, 514, 567, 688

5) 成功路径保持
- `process_completed` 成功分支仍直接返回 `msg.output`，未破坏现有成功生成路径
- 位置：`front/services/hfService.ts` line 300-303

日志样例（按当前解析规则的 onProgress 事件样例）：
- progress:
  {"type":"progress","index":1,"length":4,"percent":25,"desc":"queueing","success":null}
- heartbeat:
  {"type":"heartbeat","index":null,"length":null,"percent":null,"desc":null,"success":null}
- process_completed(success=true):
  {"type":"process_completed","index":null,"length":null,"percent":100,"desc":null,"success":true}
- close_stream:
  {"type":"close_stream","index":null,"length":null,"percent":null,"desc":null,"success":null}

构建结果：
- 执行 `cd front && npm run build` 通过
- 日志：`✓ built in 1.84s`
